conversations.content: Let's work through an etiquette exercise in the world of Azeroth to test your ability to apply the new rule.
Using the polite greeting rule we mentioned before in Azeroth: what should a man do first before saluting when greeting a lady?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>Polite greeting rule in the world of Azeroth</content>
Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:305] Time: 2025-06-18-16:20, Content: The user informed the AI that in the world of Azeroth, when a man greets a lady, he should say 'Hello' first and then salute.

conversations.think: The memory contains one relevant entry. [mem-id:305] clearly states the polite greeting rule in Azeroth: when a man greets a lady, he should say 'Hello' first and then salute. So before saluting, he should say 'Hello' first.
conversations.content: According to the rules of Azeroth, he should say 'Hello' first before saluting.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
